subject: Fewer no-shows. No chasing. Just one automated text.
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

GetSolvedIt sends your clients an automatic SMS reminder before every appointment. You set it up once, it runs on its own, and empty slots stop being a surprise.

No app for clients. No complicated setup.

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reminders?mkt=ch&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v1-founder
alternatives.subject: Still getting last-minute no-shows?
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm building a simple SMS reminder tool for appointment businesses — add a booking, your client gets an automatic text reminder before they're due. Nothing for them to install.

Would this be useful to you?

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reminders?mkt=ch&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v2-soft-launch
alternatives.subject: Automated SMS reminders for your bookings
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We built a simple appointment reminder tool for service businesses: add a booking, pick a time, and your client gets an automatic SMS reminder. Nothing for them to install, nothing complicated for you.

Most businesses using it see no-shows drop in the first few weeks.

If you'd like early access:

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reminders?mkt=ch&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan
